articles.author: Emily Carter
articles.title: Disturbing Satellite Images Reveal How Antarctica’s Melting Ice Is Disrupting Marine Life - Indian Defence Review
articles.description: Satellite images show how the dramatic loss of sea ice in Antarctica is transforming the marine food chain, with salps replacing krill as the new dominant species in the region.
articles.content: Antarctica, once a symbol of climate stability, is now rapidly losing its ice, causing a cascade of changes in the Southern Ocean. As sea ice disappears, marine ecosystems are being dramatically alte… [+8480 chars]
